provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These regulations may be cited as Industrial Development Regulations.

provisions.title: Interpretation
Industrial licences reserved for citizens
Industrial licence application and fee
provisions.content:
4. Industrial licence application and fee
(1) An application to the Director for an industrial licence under section 6 of the Act shall be made in Form AIL 1 as set out in Schedule 1.
(2) An industrial licence issued under section 9(1) of the Act shall be in Form AIL 2 as set out in Schedule 1.
(3) The fee payable for the issue of an industrial licence under section 9(1) of the Act is P500.
(4) The annual licence fee payable under section 9(3)( b ) of the Act is P500.

provisions.title: Application to manufacture new or different product
provisions.content:
5. Application to manufacture new or different product
(1) An application to the Director by a licensee under section 10(1) of the Act to manufacture a new or different product shall be made in Form AIL 3 as set out in Schedule 1.
(2) The fee payable under section 10(2) of the Act by a licensee for the issue of an industrial licence to manufacture a new or different product is P250.

provisions.title: Application to change location of manufacturing enterprise
provisions.content:
6. Application to change location of manufacturing enterprise
(1) An application to the Director by a licensee under section 10(3) of the Act to change the location of a manufacturing enterprise shall be made in Form AIL 4 as set out in Schedule.
(2) The fee payable by a licensee for the change of location of a manufacturing enterprise is P500.

provisions.title: Application to operate from additional premises
provisions.content:
7. Application to operate from additional premises
(1) An application to the Director by a licensee under section 10(3) of the Act to operate from additional premises shall be made in Form AIL 5 as set out in Schedule 1.
(2) The fee payable by a licensee to operate from additional premises is P500.

provisions.title: Notice to change the business name of manufacturing enterprise
provisions.content:
8. Notice to change the business name of manufacturing enterprise
A notice by the licensee of a change of the business name of a manufacturing enterprise under section 10(7) of the Act shall be in Form AIL 6 as set out in Schedule 1.

provisions.title: Application to transfer an industrial licence
provisions.content:
9. Application to transfer an industrial licence
(1) An application to the Director by a licensee under section 12 of the Act to transfer an industrial licence to another person shall be made in Form AIL 7 as set out in Schedule 1.
(2) The fee payable for the transfer of an industrial licence to a person other than the licensee or for the transfer of an industrial licence to another person is P500.

provisions.title: Micro and small manufacturing enterprises exempted from obtaining registration certificate
provisions.content:
10. Micro and small manufacturing enterprises exempted from obtaining registration certificate
(1) Subject to subregulation (2), the following types of manufacturing enterprises are exempted from the requirement to be registered in terms of section 15(3) of the Act-
( a ) a micro manufacturing enterprise which-
(i) employs less than 6 people including the owner, and
(ii) has an annual turnover of not exceeding P100 000;
( b ) a small manufacturing enterprise which-
(i) employs less than 25 people including the owner, and
(ii) has an annual turnover over P100 000 but not exceeding P1 500 000.
(2) An application for an exemption from the requirement to obtain a registration certificate in terms of section 15(3) of the Act shall be made in Form IRC 1 as set out in Schedule 2.

provisions.title: Registration certificates reserved for citizens
Registration certificate and fee
provisions.content:
12. Registration certificate and fee
(1) An application to the Director for a registration certificate under section 17(1) of the Act shall be made in Form IRC 2 as set out in Schedule 2.
(2) The annual registration fee payable for the issue of a registration certificate under section 18(1) of the Act is P500.
(3) A registration certificate issued under section 18(1) of the Act shall be in Form IRC 3 as set out in Schedule 2.

provisions.title: Application to transfer registration certificate
provisions.content:
13. Application to transfer registration certificate
(1) An application to the Director by a certificate holder under section 20 of the Act to transfer a registration certificate to another person shall be made in Form IRC 4 as set out in Schedule 2.
(2) The fee payable for the transfer of a registration certificate is P500.

provisions.title: Revocation of S.I. No. 25 of 2008
provisions.content:
14. Revocation of S.I. No. 25 of 2008
The Industrial Development Regulations are hereby revoked.

provisions.chapter: PART III Registration Certificates (regs 10-14) - SCHEDULE 1 - FORM AIL 1 APPLICATION FOR INDUSTRIAL LICENCE - FORM AIL 2 INDUSTRIAL LICENCE - FORM AIL 3 APPLICATION TO MANUFACTURE ADDITIONAL (NEW OR DIFFERENT) PRODUCTS - FORM AIL 4 APPLICATION TO CHANGE THE LOCATION OF A MANUFACTURING ENTERPRISE - FORM AIL 5 APPLICATION TO MANUFACTURE FROM ADDITIONAL PREMISES - FORM AIL 6 NOTIFICATION TO CHANGE OF NAME - FORM AIL 7 APPLICATION TO TRANSFER AN INDUSTRIAL LICENCE - SCHEDULE 2 - FORM IRC 1 APPLICATION FOR EXEMPTION OF MICRO & SMALL ENTERPRISES - FORM IRC 2 APPLICATION FOR REGISTRATION CERTIFICATE - FORM IRC 3 REGISTRATION CERTIFICATE INDUSTRIAL DEVELOPMENT ACT - FORM IRC 4 APPLICATION FOR TRANSFER OF REGISTRATION CERTIFICATE - INDUSTRIAL DEVELOPMENT ACT (SIZE OF ENTERPRISES) ORDER
provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
This Order may be cited as the Industrial Development Act (Size of Enterprises) Order.

provisions.chapter: PART III Registration Certificates (regs 10-14) - SCHEDULE 1 - FORM AIL 1 APPLICATION FOR INDUSTRIAL LICENCE - FORM AIL 2 INDUSTRIAL LICENCE - FORM AIL 3 APPLICATION TO MANUFACTURE ADDITIONAL (NEW OR DIFFERENT) PRODUCTS - FORM AIL 4 APPLICATION TO CHANGE THE LOCATION OF A MANUFACTURING ENTERPRISE - FORM AIL 5 APPLICATION TO MANUFACTURE FROM ADDITIONAL PREMISES - FORM AIL 6 NOTIFICATION TO CHANGE OF NAME - FORM AIL 7 APPLICATION TO TRANSFER AN INDUSTRIAL LICENCE - SCHEDULE 2 - FORM IRC 1 APPLICATION FOR EXEMPTION OF MICRO & SMALL ENTERPRISES - FORM IRC 2 APPLICATION FOR REGISTRATION CERTIFICATE - FORM IRC 3 REGISTRATION CERTIFICATE INDUSTRIAL DEVELOPMENT ACT - FORM IRC 4 APPLICATION FOR TRANSFER OF REGISTRATION CERTIFICATE - INDUSTRIAL DEVELOPMENT ACT (SIZE OF ENTERPRISES) ORDER
provisions.title: Size of Enterprises
provisions.content:
2. Size of Enterprises
The sizes of micro, small, medium and large enterprises in terms of staff complement and annual turnover shall be as indicated below-
STAFF COMPLEMENT
ANNUAL TURNOVER
Micro Enterprises
Less than 6
Up to P100,000
Small Enterprises
Less than 25
P100,001 to P1,500,000
Medium Enterprises
25 to 100
P1,500,001 to P5,000,000
Large Enterprises
More than 100
Above P5,000,000
